text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I'm walking around the academy, I come
across Winning Ticket looking very preoccupied
by something.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... Ummm... Hmmm!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Good timing!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I was getting in some extra practice by running
with the others, but something about it started to
feel really weird!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Like... I was being all squeezed and squished!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Do you get what I mean?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Man, yeah, that's what I figured! Urghhh, how can
I explain this?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Over there, isn't that...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: HEEEY! RIIIICE!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Did I scare you? Sorry!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I gotta ask! Weren't you doing free
practice just now?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, um... I mean... yes.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
We passed each other earlier. Did you happen to
see me running?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Uh, yes... sort of...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That's GREAT! I'm gonna be okay, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Rice is super observant. I bet she knows why I
started feeling weird!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
H-huh?! Um, I don't know if I have anything
helpful to tell you...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: PLEAAAASE!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: If... Sniffle... If I don't figure it out... it's gonna bug me so much...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I won't even be able to enjoy my fooood!
Waaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: O-oh no! P-please don't cry... Uh, um...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Wait... I know! Um, I think your speed did seem to
drop a little... toward the end...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I noticed it when you were struggling for the
lead... B-but no, it was probably just my
imagination...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ooh, Trainer?! Have you figured something out?
choice_data_list:
Maybe you were overconscious of the other
racers.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, more power, huh? You mean, like, so I can
keep accelerating even at the end, right?
choice_data_list: Right. Let's try during your next training.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Got it!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you really are amazing though, Rice! I knew
you were super observant!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
N-no, you probably shouldn't put too much stock
in what I—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much! You're amazing! A genius!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wha?! N-no way, I'm not...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: A totally GENIUS Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Aahhh... My voice isn't loud enough to compete
with hers...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Rice Shower cowers at the yelling, Winning
Ticket seems to have gotten over her confusion.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh, now that I think about it, near the end I did
realize I was running with everyone around me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoooaa! That's it! It made moving around so
much harder!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
So if I wanna avoid that, I have to make sure I
don't get caught up in the crowd!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
All right! Now that I understand what felt off, I
feel so much better!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Amazing.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh? What is, what is?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, uh, um... I just think it's amazing how... how
quickly you cheered up, that's all...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: For real? You gotta try it too, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I know—you should come train with me sometime!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ehhhh?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Let's race each other, and we'll both feel super
refreshed by the end of it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Before long, Winning Ticket has pressured—er, persuaded —Rice Shower to schedule a training session with her, and she seems over the moon about it.
